hero.title: Custom Name SVGs for T-Shirts
hero.subtitle: Generated instantly and cricut ready
hero.text: Making custom family reunion shirts, bridal party tees, or birthday T-shirts?.
hero.text2: Typing names, adjusting fonts, and manually welding them in Design Space so they don't cut in separate pieces is a major bottleneck—especially when you have an order of 10+ shirts.
hero.text3: I'm building a new feature for NamePreview (generating SVG files instantly) for different shirt styles. Try the demo here, and sign up if you want to be a beta tester.
